congress-119-S-1135.latest_action: Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 473.
congress-119-S-1135.title: A bill to amend the National Trails System Act to direct the Secretary of the Interior to conduct a study on the feasibility of designating the Bonneville Shoreline Trail.

ocd-bill/36d96796-8e46-4fe0-b385-7eaa8ab.title: Establishes certain electric vehicle supply equipment development processes and standards concerning public health and safety; removes certain existing approval requirements while preserving applicable safety and inspection standards.

ocd-bill/8f566523-beef-4dc0-930b-2431c11.title: Allowing new buildings where new parking is provided to have an optional, charger-agnostic, power-based allocation method alternative to certain electric vehicle charging infrastructure requirements

ocd-bill/cd65c3ac-335e-4bfd-a1f3-438bfb1.title: Regulate the ownership of electric vehicle charging stations
